reasoning: The document has high overall fidelity scores (composite 0.9727, content 1.0) and strong text preservation metrics, indicating the content is entirely present. However, there is one major structural defect: bulleted lists within table cells have been flattened into plain text with literal bullet characters instead of using proper HTML list markup. This creates an accessibility barrier and requires manual correction.

concerns.analysis: The source document contains bulleted lists under several agenda topics (e.g., 'Project Finance Update', 'Discuss Agricultural Data Development'). In the extraction output, these lists have been flattened into plain text inside the table cells, using literal bullet characters ('•') and newline characters instead of proper list structures. This breaks accessibility, as screen readers cannot interpret the plain text as a list.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
Project Finance Update 
[bullet] Cost share payments received. 
[bullet] Funds expended.
concerns.output_quote:
Project Finance Update
• Cost share payments received.
• Funds expended.

concerns.description: Table header markup issues: 1 table(s) have time values in <th> cells: "10:00-10:05"
concerns.analysis: data_in_th_time=1, no_th_tables=0. Minor semantic markup issues: tables lack <th> elements or use time values as headers. These affect screen reader context but are less severe than data misrepresentation.

action_items: Convert plain text bullets inside table cells into proper <ul>/<li> structures
Review table headers to ensure <th> tags are used for appropriate column/row headers rather than just time values
